title: How to calculate age in years from a birth date
task: Get a person's age in whole years from their date of birth.
keywords: how old from date of birth spreadsheet

excel.note: Use TODAY() for the current age; DATEDIF with "Y" returns completed years.

explanation: DATEDIF(start, end, "Y") returns the number of complete years between two dates. Born 1990-06-15, on 2024-06-15 the person has completed exactly 34 years. In a real sheet put the birth date in A2 and use TODAY() as the end date so the age updates automatically. (We verified with fixed dates so the result is stable.)
